title: lsp verb (language service provider)
manager: A Language Server Protocol implementation so any LSP-speaking editor — VS Code, Neovim, Zed — gets FSL completion, diagnostics, hover, and go-to-definition for free. LSP is the single highest-leverage integration in modern editor tooling: build it once and FSL becomes a first-class language in every serious editor, instead of a syntax-highlight-only guest.
cs: jssm#629 is the twin lsp-verb row; fsl#146 (MS LSP research) is the scoping precursor — both fold here
